title: Section 25A
content: 1[25A. Provisions of this Chapter to have overriding effect.--The provisions of this Chapter or any rule made thereunder shall have effect notwithstanding anything inconsistent therewith contained elsewhere in this Act or in any other law for the time being in force.]
footnote: 2. Chapter IIIA (consisting of sections 25A to 25C ins. by Act 18 of 1976, s. 6 (w.e.f. 1-12-1975).
